headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Mid-America Apartment, Raises Price Target to $146
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Michael Lewis   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Buy and raises the price target from $136 to $146.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Mid-America Apartment, Raises Price Target to $152
summary: Mizuho  analyst Haendel St. Juste   maintains Mid-America Apartment (NYSE:MAA) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $148 to $152.
